nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: Joanna Lady of Strathnaver was born in 1109, in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland. She married Freskin de Moravia before 1132. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1172, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Joanna Lady of Strathnaver est née en 1109, à Duffus, Elginshire, Écosse. Elle a épousé Freskin de Moravia avant 1132. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1172, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joanna Lady of Strathnaver wurde 1109 in Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland geboren. Sie hat vor 1132 Freskin de Moravia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1172 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Joanna Lady of Strathnaver è nata il nel 1109 nel Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland. Lei sposato Freskin de Moravia prima del 1132. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1172, nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Lady of Strathnaver(은)는 1109년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 더프스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1132년 이전 Freskin de Moravia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1172년 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joanna Lady of Strathnaver nasceu em 1109, em Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland. Ela casou-se com Freskin de Moravia antes 1132. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1172, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joanna Lady of Strathnaver родилась в 1109 г. в местности дуффус, элгиншир, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Freskin de Moravia перед 1132 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1172 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joanna Lady of Strathnaver nació en 1109, en Duffus, Elginshire, Scotland. Se casó con Freskin de Moravia antes de 1132. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1172, en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años.
